name: x-pp-mcp
description: X v2 API mirror with first-class Articles support — tweets, users, lists, spaces, bookmarks, likes via the official OpenAPI; long-form Articles authoring via browser-sniffed editor endpoints (GraphQL with rotating operation hashes).

x_oauth2_user_token.title: X_OAUTH2_USER_TOKEN
x_oauth2_user_token.description: Sets X_OAUTH2_USER_TOKEN for the X (Twitter) MCP server.
